findings: Docs explicitly require partial or failed when a commander cannot launch the full SS-250 (50 squad leads x 5 workers) and forbid silent downgrade to success.
Launch-proof artifacts swarm-state.json and child-agents.jsonl are required evidence.
Gap: docs do not clearly say degraded or missing proof files alone must force partial instead of success.
Gap: incomplete bundle evidence is not explicitly defined as a no-false-success trigger in the reviewed docs.
